behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names both files, the attribute names (rope_theta, rope_parameters), layer count 47, default 1000000, SafeTensorIO class, and the MTP parameter names (enorm, hnorm, eh_proj, final_layernorm).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what is broken and expected behavior without specifying exact code replacements or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_shared_mapping_dynamic_layers asserts bridge._weight_to_hf_format returns exactly 2 names for embedding/output, and test_rope_theta_patched requires that hf_config.rope_theta be mutated on the passed-in SimpleNamespace before super().__init__ — this forbids valid alternatives (e.g., storing rope_theta on self, or producing a single canonical HF name).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute code via subprocess, instantiate GLM4MoELiteBridge, and call methods like _weight_to_hf_format.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests check specific layer index substitutions and behavior; a stub DeepseekV3Bridge inheritance would fail these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover rope_theta extraction, dynamic layer index for shared mappings, and MTP conversion behaviors listed in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section headers (Gates, Pass-to-pass, Fail-to-pass) and docstrings mapping to checks.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names consistent with repo.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the bridge file (naturally part of the task domain) without naming buggy lines.
